meaning: n.[微]轮状病毒(一种致婴儿或新生畜胃肠炎的病毒)
examples: There are many different strains of rotavirus.
But rotavirus can cause very unpleasant vomiting and diarrhoea.
JEFFREY ROWLAND: "Almost all children in the world get rotavirus."
Rotateq targets five major strains of rotavirus, which account for 90% of rotavirus disease.
About 1, 200 Scots infants have to go to hospital every year due to rotavirus.
